subject: Re: Tomorrow?
body:
yes

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, May 1, 2007 9:10:25 AM
Subject: Tomorrow?


Welcome back!
Can I see you tomorrow or Wednesday...before you jet off again?  Love to 
catch you up on my progress and get your honest thoughts.

Kisses,
Catherine
